intro: Masdevallia royi, also known as the "Roi Masdevallia," is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine, particularly in the Andean region, where it is valued for its potential health benefits, including the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Masdevallia royi include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Masdevallia royi include infusions and decoctions, as well as extracts, which are used to treat a variety of ailments, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
